meaning: vt.用撞杆叩(地)以听声(考古中使用的一种测试方法)
examples: Many carmakers then offer pricey upgrades, such as a Bose sound system.
I knew a guy who could repair anything from my daughter’s talking Barney to our Bose Wave radio.
Kaylan Bose, spokesman of the Bombay Stock Exchange, said late Thursday 'As of now, we'll open tomorrow.'
However, BBC sports editor Mihir Bose believes there is no chance of the Brazilian being sacked.
Bose says the Arsenal board are confident that Kroenke will not sell to Usmanov.
